classes.reasoning: This document is a published medical review article titled 'Peripheral arterial disease in women: A narrative review' published in the journal 'Vasa' (2024), volume 53, issue 6, pages 366-370. It includes author affiliations, abstract, keywords, references, submission/acceptance dates, ORCID identifiers, and DOI (10.1024/0301-1526/a001137), all hallmarks of peer-reviewed academic literature.

summary: This is a published narrative review article examining peripheral arterial disease (PAD) in women, published in the medical journal Vasa in 2024. The review discusses gender differences in PAD prevalence, risk factors, the role of estrogen and hormone replacement therapy, and treatment outcomes, synthesizing evidence from multiple population studies and clinical trials.
references_to: ACC/AHA Practice Guidelines for the management of patients with PAD
TASC II Working Group Inter-Society Consensus for the Management of Peripheral Arterial Disease
Women's Health Initiative randomized controlled trial
National Health and Nutrition Examination Study, 1999 to 2004
